sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98907" key="sumfili/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμφῐλία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n98907.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mutual friendship</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">συμφυλία</ref> </xr> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
